# Anduril and Impulse Space Expand Partnership to Conduct RPO Mission Demonstration in GEO

Anduril and Impulse Space are partnering to conduct a high-precision Rendezvous and Proximity Operations (RPO) mission in geosynchronous Earth orbit (GEO), targeted for 2026.
